name: AI Print App - Smart Xerox Workflow

nodes.name: 1. Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Entry point. Receives PDF file + user name, phone, and location (lat/lng) from the mobile/web app.

nodes.name: 2. Code Node - Parse & Calculate
nodes.notes: JavaScript logic to parse page count, detect color vs B&W, calculate base price estimate, and structure data for the AI node.

nodes.name: 3. AI Node - Groq API (LLaMA 3.3 70B)
nodes.notes: Calls Groq API using LLaMA 3.3 70B model. Ultra-fast inference, free tier available. Returns smart print recommendations and cost-saving tips.

parameters.url: =https://overpass-api.de/api/interpreter?data=[out:json];node["amenity"="copy_shop"](around:3000,{{ $('2. Code Node - Parse & Calculate').first().json.userLat }},{{ $('2. Code Node - Parse & Calculate').first().json.userLng }});out;

nodes.name: 4. HTTP Request - Google Maps Nearby Shops
nodes.notes: Uses Google Places API to find Xerox/print shops within 3km of the user's location. Returns shop names, ratings, and open/closed status.

nodes.name: 5. IF Node - Shop Open Check
nodes.notes: Checks if the nearest print shop is currently open. True = open, send confirmation. False = closed, notify user of shop hours.

nodes.name: 6. Set Node - Structure Final Output
nodes.notes: Combines all data — user info, nearest shop, price estimate, Groq AI suggestions — into a clean structured object for the notification node.

nodes.name: 7. WhatsApp Node (Twilio) - Send Confirmation
nodes.notes: Sends a WhatsApp message to the user with file summary, estimated price, nearest open shop details, and Groq AI print tips.

main.node: 4. HTTP Request - Google Maps Nearby Shops
